subcodes.first_line: All the world hath been created to know the Ancient Lord, and when the divine test appeared [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمیع عالم از برای عرفان مالک قدم خلق شده اند و چون امتحان الهی بمیان آمد
subcodes.subjects: @universality of the Cause, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
